footerDisplay:
Created by @Knilo. 

All config details can be obtained using `node palGateCli.js config` command.

name.title: Platform Name
name.description: The name of the platform instance.

token.title: Session Token
token.description: The session token generated during device linking.

tokenType.title: Token Type
tokenType.description: Set to 0 for SMS, 1 for Primary linking, or 2 for Secondary linking.

accessoryType.title: Default Accessory Type
accessoryType.description: The default type for discovered gates. Default is 'garageDoor'.

gateOpeningDelay.title: Gate Opening Duration
gateOpeningDelay.description: How long in milliseconds the gate should show as 'Opening' before becoming fully 'Open'.

gateOpenDelay.title: Gate Open Duration
gateOpenDelay.description: How long in milliseconds the gate stays in the fully 'Open' state before closing automatically.

enableRelayLocks.title: Enable Relay Mode Accessories
enableRelayLocks.description: Expose two virtual relay accessories (Hold Open / Hold Closed) for gates where you have admin/latching permissions.

relayAccessoryType.title: Relay Accessory Type
relayAccessoryType.description: The accessory type to use for virtual relay controllers. Default is 'lock'.

pollInterval.title: Poll Interval (Seconds)
pollInterval.description: How often in seconds the plugin should check the PalGate API for external state updates (e.g. Hold Open toggled by another admin). Default is 60.

customGates.title: Custom Gate Settings
customGates.description: Optional overrides for individual gates. Each object in this array can specify custom settings for a gate.

deviceId.title: Gate ID
deviceId.description: The unique ID of the gate.

name.title: Custom Gate Name
name.description: A custom name for the gate.

garageDoor.title: Expose as Garage Door
garageDoor.description: Set to true to expose this gate as a garage door.

switch.title: Expose as Switch
switch.description: Set to true to expose this gate as a switch.

lock.title: Expose as Lock
lock.description: Set to true to expose this gate as a lock.

hide.title: Hide Gate
hide.description: Set to true to hide this gate from HomeKit.

gateOpeningDelay.title: Gate Opening Duration Override
gateOpeningDelay.description: How long in milliseconds this specific gate should show as 'Opening'. Defaults to global setting.

gateOpenDelay.title: Gate Open Duration Override
gateOpenDelay.description: How long in milliseconds this specific gate stays 'Open'. Defaults to global setting.

relaySwitch.title: Expose Relay as Switch
relaySwitch.description: Set to true to expose the virtual relays for this gate as Switches.

relayLock.title: Expose Relay as Lock
relayLock.description: Set to true to expose the virtual relays for this gate as Locks.
